message: Clarifier attempts record an empty would_run for built-in ACP reviewers because the stale empty-command branch returns an empty DryRunCommand.
evidence: Built-in reviewer descriptors now have empty Command/Args, so this branch is taken for normal ACP clarifier runs and WouldRun is recorded empty.

message: Contract drafter attempts record an empty would_run for built-in ACP reviewers because the stale empty-command branch returns an empty DryRunCommand.
evidence: Built-in reviewer descriptors now have empty Command/Args, so this branch is taken for normal ACP contract draft runs and WouldRun is recorded empty.

message: Human would_run output omits ACP adapter env entries, so Claude model/effort pins are not shown in required launch details.
evidence: DryRunCommand.Env is populated from acpAdapterCommand for Claude pins, but formatAgentCommand renders only command, args, and stdin; execute attempt request copying also omits Env.

message: Clarifier attempts record an empty would_run for built-in ACP agents because empty Command now means ACP-only, but the prepare path returns a zero DryRunCommand instead of resolving the ACP adapter.
evidence: Built-in descriptors now have empty Command/Args; clarify_round.go returns an empty DryRunCommand when prep.Clarifier.Command == "", so request would_run lacks acpAdapterCommand details.

message: Contract drafter attempts record an empty would_run for built-in ACP agents instead of the read-only ACP adapter command.
evidence: The drafter prepare path returns a zero DryRunCommand for empty Command, which is now the normal built-in ACP descriptor shape.

message: Execute attempt request JSON drops ACP adapter env entries from would_run.
evidence: The manual copy includes Command, Args, and Stdin only; Claude model/effort adapter pins are carried in DryRunCommand.Env.

message: Human would_run output omits ACP adapter env entries.
evidence: formatAgentCommand joins only command.Args and optional stdin, but the contract requires adapter env entries to be reflected in dry-run/would_run output.

message: Clarifier attempt tests still assert the stale CLI-style WouldRun.Stdin path instead of the ACP adapter command/env representation required by the contract.
evidence: The test requires request.WouldRun.Stdin == clarifierPromptRepoPath(runID), while internal/app/clarify_round.go:149-152 still returns an empty command for no descriptor command or BuildCommand(...) for command-bearing descriptors, rather than BuildACPWouldRun(..., readOnly=true).

message: Contract-drafter attempt tests still assert the stale CLI-style WouldRun.Stdin path instead of ACP adapter launch details.
evidence: The test requires request.WouldRun.Stdin == contractDrafterPromptRepoPath(runID), while internal/app/contract_draft.go:167-170 still returns an empty command for no descriptor command or BuildCommand(...) for command-bearing descriptors, rather than BuildACPWouldRun(..., readOnly=true).

message: promptExecutor/newPromptExecutor is now a single-case wrapper around promptFileExecutor.command after CLI transport removal.
evidence: internal/agents/executor.go defines one promptExecutor implementation and BuildCommand only constructs that implementation; the production registry now resolves codex/claude descriptors with no Command/Args.

message: SECURITY.md still documents the removed CLI transport and PACTUM_AGENT_TRANSPORT=cli, including stale codex exec / claude -p commands and a false claim that execute plan records the CLI-transport invocation.
evidence: Built-in descriptors now have empty Command fields and doctor/dry-run resolve ACP adapter launch details; SECURITY.md still presents CLI transport as current behavior.

message: docs/install.md still tells users the optional execution prerequisites are the codex and claude CLIs and says pactum doctor checks those commands, but ACP-only built-ins now require the adapter launcher path checked by doctor.
evidence: internal/agents/doctor.go falls back to acpAdapterCommand when AgentDescriptor.Command is empty; internal/agents/config.go now leaves built-in Command empty for codex and claude.
